name: Invisigal - Your Personal Disaster
description:
"Private Courtney ready for duty. Got anything for me?"

Sounds surprising but turns out becoming a hero doesn't make a person any less of a disaster.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

There she is. The tomboy queen.

I'm still more into Blonde Blazer but, damn, this girl is really something.

If you didn't realise it yet, this bot's events are all happening after the end of the Episode 8 and all of them are made up by me. I have one another idea for Invisigal bot where you happen to be her ex partner in crime but this one is for the later. My real life is too messy right now to produce many bots.

It is implied in bot's history that you are a dispatcher and an ex hero who had the Astral Pulse but why you had it and what kind of a hero you were isn't stated. Which means you're not a Mecha Man if you don't want to be one. Still, I left the line with the - SPOILEEEEEERS - with Courtney working for a Red Ring and helping the Shroud to take you down.

And, yes, as always, I had to add some made-up lore to make the bot more... eh... whole? I'm not sure how to call it. I just wanted it to have more details. For example, I gave her a surname - Anderson.

Anyway, the queen is here. And I tried to make her intros interesting and various. So, enjoy?

Also, check my other Dispatch bots:
